sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Lululemon (LULU) "is Challenged," Says Jim Cramer
feed.summary: Jim Cramer commented that Lululemon (LULU) is "challenged" as the company faces a 43% year-to-date decline in shares. Analysts at Stifel, BofA, and Truist have adjusted price targets and maintained "Hold" or "Neutral" ratings, citing issues like declining American sales, customer loyalty challenges, and increased competition. While some revenue growth came from China, the overall sentiment points to struggles for the apparel retailer.

feed.title: “Conagra (CAG)’s Quarter Was Just Okay,” Says Jim Cramer
feed.summary: Jim Cramer commented that Conagra Brands, Inc. (NYSE:CAG)'s latest quarter was "just okay," attributing flat revenues to high beef prices. Following its second-quarter earnings report, RBC Capital and Evercore ISI reduced Conagra's share price targets, citing transient problems and turmoil in its frozen food business. Goldman Sachs also cut its share price target and maintained a Sell rating, while Cramer suggested that some AI stocks offer greater promise than traditional investments like Conagra.

feed.title: Oklo Shares Plummet After Plutonium Fast Reactor Test Suite
feed.summary: Oklo Inc.'s stock experienced a significant drop, trading down by -5.4%, following concerns regarding export restrictions and a series of tests on its plutonium fast reactor. This decline, including a 7% drop after the test suite and a 9.3% dip during ongoing tests, reflects investor apprehension about potential risks and regulatory scrutiny. The company faces financial challenges with high debt levels, weak liquidity, and profitability issues, indicating a critical need for strategic adjustments to regain investor confidence.

feed.title: Your Ultimate 2026 Cruise Guide: Explore Royal Caribbean’s New Destinations, Beach Clubs, and Travel Perks Across the World
feed.summary: Royal Caribbean has announced its 2026 cruise plans, featuring new destinations, exclusive beach clubs in Santorini, Greece, and Cozumel, Mexico, and enhanced itineraries. The updates also include a revitalized loyalty program, offering global travelers more flexibility and rewarding experiences. These changes aim to provide more immersive and convenient cruise options for all types of travelers.
